personality_one_liner: Uber-level stark simplicity and Tesla-level cleanliness, defined by stark contrasts, generous breathing room, and a relentless focus on the vehicle and map.

spacing.rule: Generous margin (lg/xl) around containers. Sticky primary buttons must float over scrollable content with clear safe-area bottom padding. No cramped half-width cards.

do's: Use over the persistent map interface (bottom sheets, floating search bars).
Sticky headers above scrollable vehicle listings.
Featured vehicle cards layered over hero photography.
dont's: Don't blur dense forms, profile settings rows, or standard buttons.
Don't stack more than 2 glass surfaces (e.g., header + tab bar is enough).

screens.name: Splash & Onboarding
screens.purpose: Communicate brand value ('Drive More. Own Less.') with cinematic full-bleed visuals.
screens.layout: Full-bleed imagery with a vertical gradient scrim (transparent to surfaceInverse at bottom). Large typography, floating 'Get Started' CTA sticky at bottom.

screens.name: Auth (Login/Signup)
screens.purpose: Minimalist entry point via Email/Password or Google.

states.error: Inline red validation text under inputs

screens.layout: Single column. Large title, vertically stacked inputs with labels above. Sticky primary CTA. Secondary 'Continue with Google' button with logo. Generous vertical rhythm.

screens.name: Home / Discovery
screens.purpose: Dual-mode map & list view to find nearby vehicles.

states.loading: Skeleton map markers and skeleton list cards
states.empty: Illustration of empty road: 'No vehicles nearby, zoom out map.'

screens.layout: Full-bleed Map as the background. Floating glass search bar at top safe area. '@gorhom/bottom-sheet' containing category chips (All, Cars, Bikes, Subs) and the vehicle list. Swipe up to expand list. List items use edge-to-edge images.

screens.name: Search & Filters
screens.layout: Modal over Home. Chip rows for Category, Price Slider, Transmission, Seats. Sticky 'Apply Filters' CTA at bottom.

screens.name: Vehicle Details
screens.purpose: Airbnb-style immersive listing to drive conversions.

states.error: Failed to load vehicle details + Retry button

screens.layout: Large hero image (edge-to-edge) at top. Vehicle Name & Price below. Horizontal scroll for Specs (Seats, Fuel, Auto). Trust section with Host avatar (round) and Rating. Sticky 'Book Now' CTA inside a glass container at the absolute bottom over scrolling content.

screens.name: Booking Flow
screens.layout: Clean stack layout. Date picker module (calendar), Add-ons toggles, Cost breakdown (subtotal, taxes, RideMiles discount). Sticky 'Confirm & Pay' at bottom.

screens.name: Active Trip
screens.purpose: Real-time dashboard for the ongoing rental.
screens.layout: Dark-First Utility inspired layout nested here: Giant countdown timer / mileage tracker. Prominent 'End Trip' and 'SOS' action buttons. Inspection photos grid. Minimalist, focused on live operational data.

screens.name: RideMiles Rewards
screens.purpose: Showcase user loyalty tier and points.

states.empty: You haven't earned any RideMiles yet.

screens.layout: Hero tier card (glassmorphism over a brandTertiary gradient). Circular progress ring for points. List of available coupons below.

screens.name: Wallet & Coupons
screens.layout: Large balance display at top. List of Payment Methods. 'Add Card' floating action button.

screens.name: Profile + KYC
screens.layout: Avatar at top. Clean list rows (trailing chevron) for settings. KYC uses a stepper layout (License -> Aadhaar -> Face selfie) with full-screen camera overlays.

screens.name: Notifications
screens.purpose: Inbox for system, trip, and promotional alerts.

states.empty: All caught up! No new notifications.

screens.layout: Simple vertical list. Unread items have a brandTertiary background tint.

screens.name: Vehicle Owner Mini-Dashboard
screens.purpose: Earnings and listings overview for hosts.

states.empty: List your first vehicle to start earning.

screens.layout: Segmented control at top (Earnings | Listings). 2-column grid for stat cards (Total Earned, Active Trips). List of owned vehicles below.

onboarding_hero_1.alt: White electric car driving on dark city street

car_listing_suv.alt: White Cadillac Escalade SUV driving on highway

instructions_to_main_agent: Apply the monochrome high-contrast iOS-Native Clean personality. Black is the primary color in light mode, white in dark mode. Emerald Green (#05C46B) is reserved for success states, tags, and very specific brand highlights to emulate Tesla/Uber premium vibes.
Never use blue, indigo, purple, or navy anywhere in the UI. Follow the strict color ban.
Map UI (Home/Discovery): Use a persistent full-bleed map behind a @gorhom/bottom-sheet. Ensure the bottom sheet has a glassmorphism header and swipeable interactions.
Vehicle Details MUST follow the Airbnb layout: massive hero image, horizontal scrolling specs, prominent host trust signals, and a sticky booking CTA anchored securely at the bottom.
Use gradient scrims (transparent to surfaceInverse) strictly on images with text overlays (like onboarding). Text over raw images without a scrim is a zero-tolerance violation.
Implement haptics meticulously using the defined haptics mapping. Feedback on tabs, button presses, and bottom sheet snaps is critical.
Ensure safe area boundaries are strictly respected—content should never sit under notches or the home indicator.
Payments are mocked for the MVP build. Document this clearly in the UI (e.g., 'Test Mode' badge).
Use Phosphor icons consistently with 'regular' weight (no mixing filled/outlined except in tab bars).
